description: Take manual control of the cockpit target camera for free pan/tilt/zoom even without a target lock, with automatic ground-point tracking. Pan to aim, stop and the plugin raycasts where you're looking and snaps the camera onto that world point — tracks it as the aircraft moves around (JTAC / lasing-pod style designation). Up to 40× zoom with zoom-aware fine sensitivity, MFD HUD overlay (RNG/ALT/HDG/GRID/MODE/Mag), IR↔Color toggle, floating-origin safe lock storage, self-collision filter, auto-revert when the game locks a real target. Multiplayer compatible — client-side only.
